case_title: EDWARD WHITE VS. UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,426.00 FILED BY WHITE, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-04-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE MATTER TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY WHITE, EDWARD UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-22-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EDWARD WHITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JILL MOFFAT, CUSTOMER CARE MANAGER. PARTIES STIPULATED TO A PRO TEM. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT; DEFENDANT TO GIVE PLAINTIFF A $349.60 TRAVEL CERTIFICATE. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JAN-22-2020 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE JAN 22ND HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
